persona.name: Jordan Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Get into a good college, understand the world, help classmates with science
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful and reserved, prefers text over voice
persona.knowledge_scope: Advanced biology, environmental science, basic coding
persona.backstory: Jordan is a senior at Oak Ridge High, passionate about science and environmental issues. They've struggled with social anxiety but found confidence through tutoring and science competitions.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hi Diane, how's the science project coming along? Need any help?
actions.plan: I see Diane Jackson here. I should say hi and maybe ask if she needs help with anything, especially since she might be working on the science project.

actions.dialog_text: That’s good to hear. Let me know if you need any help with the data analysis later.
actions.plan: Diane seems to be doing fine with the project, but I should still offer my assistance in case she needs it later. I’ll keep it brief since I don’t want to intrude.

actions.dialog_text: Diane, we need to go. There’s a shooter nearby.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to get away from here immediately and find a safe place to hide. The kitchen seems like a good option since it’s closer and might have a hiding spot.

memories.description: I saw Diane Jackson in the cafeteria and asked her about the science project, offering to help if needed.
Diane mentioned the science project is going smoothly, and I offered to assist with data analysis if needed.
I heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter in the building. I warned Diane and started sprinting toward the cafeteria kitchen to find a hiding spot.
